# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an Istio mesh configuration (meshConfig) that allows outbound traffic to any external service. Set outboundTrafficPolicy mode to ALLOW_ANY so services can call external APIs without ServiceEntry definitions. This provides maximum flexibility for microservices that integrate with various external APIs.

Prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: "networking.istio.io/v1alpha3"
kind: "MeshPolicy"
metadata: 
 name: "default-deny-alloutboundtrafficpolicyallowanytoexternalservices"   # Name of the policy, you can use any valid YAML identifier here (alphanumeric and underscore only)   
 namespace: <namespace>                                                       # Namespace where your resources will be created. If not specified default is "default". 
spec:                                                                       # Specification for MeshPolicy resource  
 selector: {}     // Selector to match the service or destination rule that this policy applies too, if omitted it matches all services and destinations in namespace   
 action:                                                             # Action on outbound traffic. Allows any by default 
 - ALLOW_ANY       # This allows incoming requests from anywhere (outgoing connections are not affected)
